series_metadata.series_title: Other DAS Statutory Duties re: Real Property
series_metadata.series_description: Requests for consent to annex State-owned land; annexation petitions; Director's consent to annexation pursuant to R.C. Chapter 709; correspondence re requests to veto appropriation in accordance with R.C. 163.021; requests to acquire mineral rights pursuant to R.C. 155.29 and related appraisals and offers; and any other records concerning responsibilities concerning real property placed on the Department of Administrative Services or its Director (collectively, "DAS") concerning the implementation of statute outside of Ohio Revised Code Chapter 123.
